title: Craft Smitting Template
description: Minecraft mod that allows players to craft Smithing Templates
body:
🔨 **Crafting the Future:**

Crafting Smelting Templates Mod
Tired of endlessly searching for that perfect Smithing Template? Say goodbye to the grind and hello to efficiency!

The Crafting Smithing Templates mod is a small, quality-of-life addition that integrates Smithing Templates directly into the crafting table. This essential mod ensures that once you find a template, you never have to worry about losing or running out of copies again.

✨ **Key Feature**

This mod introduces one simple, yet crucial recipe:

Craft Smithing Templates: Easily duplicate any found Smithing Template using its original material components (Diamonds, Netherite Ingots, etc.) combined with the Smithing Template item itself.

⛏️ **Why You Need This Mod**

Reduce Grind: Spend less time spelunking and more time customizing your gear.

Ultimate Convenience: Duplicate your templates immediately after finding them, ensuring you have enough for your entire team or multiple sets of armor.

Stay Focused: Maintain momentum on your build projects without tedious resource farming.

Get back to building and customizing your ultimate gear with the Crafting Smithing Templates mod!

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faa968c808a07f84cb2c810b73a84095aff5c22e.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)
